title: The Settling of the Manor of Tara
description: The five provinces of Ireland correspond to the five elements and five directions — the Celtic cosmological map.
introduction: The five provinces of Ireland correspond to the five elements and five directions — the Celtic cosmological map.

translation.original_text: Cóiced Connacht siar, fis. Cóiced Ulad thuaid, cathugud. Cóiced Laigen soir, borrfad. Cóiced Muman deas, ceol.
translation.text: Connacht in the west: knowledge. Ulster in the north: battle. Leinster in the east: prosperity. Munster in the south: music.
